events.name: extension_activated
events.description: Recorded when the extension activates so we can measure active extension sessions.

plan.comment: Current local entitlement tier label only.

events.name: connect_account_started
events.description: Recorded when a user intentionally starts account connection from the extension.

events.name: free_diagnostic_started
events.description: Recorded when a user starts the first free workflow entry point.

events.name: proof_summary_viewed
events.description: Recorded when the extension shows a local proof-style diagnostic summary.

workspace.comment: Local workspace folder display name only.

events.name: open_packs_clicked
events.description: Recorded when a user opens the packs catalog from the extension.

events.name: open_pack_clicked
events.description: Recorded when a user opens a specific recommended pack from the extension.

placement.comment: Surface where the specific pack was opened.

events.name: upgrade_clicked
events.description: Recorded when a user intentionally opens an upgrade flow.

placement.comment: Surface where the upgrade CTA was clicked, such as command or sidebar.

events.name: purchase_returned
events.description: Recorded when the website routes a completed purchase back into VS Code.

events.name: purchase_return_verification_started
events.description: Recorded when a user opens the safe purchase-return verification flow from the extension.

events.name: billing_portal_clicked
events.description: Recorded when a user opens the billing portal from the extension.

events.name: refresh_entitlements_started
events.description: Recorded when a user manually refreshes entitlements.

events.name: chat_prompt_sent
events.description: Recorded when a connected user sends a chat prompt from the Companion chat view.

hasWorkspace.comment: Whether a workspace folder was open when the prompt was sent.

events.name: chat_response_received
events.description: Recorded when Companion receives a chat response.

mode.comment: Whether the response came from local workspace tools, the model-backed path, or the contextual fallback path.

events.name: chat_response_failed
events.description: Recorded when a chat request fails before a usable response is shown.

events.name: chat_action_clicked
events.description: Recorded when the user clicks a structured action button from a chat response.

events.name: chat_cleared
events.description: Recorded when the user clears the local chat conversation in the view.
